[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000011010 3
1 010110110 5
2 000000000 a
3 101100000 3
4 011110000 4
5 000101010 3
6 000100100 2
7 100010000 2

23 100101010 4

56 011111111 8
67 101010011 5
70 000101011 4
